title: satureja glabra
intro: Satureja glabra, also known as warm white thyme or white savory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Satureja glabra include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Satureja glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Satureja glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
